verses.geez: ወሰምዓት፡ በኪያሆን፡ መዋዕል፡ ዮዲት፡ ወለተ፡ ሜራሪ፡ ወልደ፡ ሆክስ፡ ወልደ፡ ዮሴፍ፡ ወልደ፡ ዖዝያን፡ ወልደ፡ ሕልቅያ፡ ወልድ፡ አናንዩ፡ ወልደ፡ ጋዲዮን፡ ወልደ፡ ራዎይል፡ ወልደ፡ ሐቂቶ፡ ወልደ፡ ኤልያስ፡ ወልደ፡ ኤልያብ፡ ወልደ፡ ናትናኤል፡ ወልደ፡ ሰላምያል፡ ወልደ፡ ሰለስዳይ፡ ወልደ፡ እሥራኤል።

translations.lxx: Now at that time Judith heard thereof, which was the daughter of Merari, the son of Ox, the son of Joseph, the son of Oziel, the son of Elcia, the son of Eliu, the son of Chelcias, the son of Eliab, the son of Nathanael, the son of Salamiel, the son of Sarasadai, the son of Israel.

verses.geez: ወምታሰ፡ ምናሴ፡ ዘእምነገዳ፡ ወእምሀገራ፡ ወሞተ፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ማዕረረ፡ ሰገም።

translations.lxx: And Manasses was her husband, of her tribe and kindred, who died in the barley harvest.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ወዐለ፡ ገዳመ፡ ኀበ፡ እለ፡ የአሥሩ፡ ከላስስተ፡ ወመጽአ፡ ላዕለ፡ ርእሱ፡ ሐሩር፡ ወአድወዮ፡ ወሰከበ፡ ወሞተ፡ ወቤጤልዋ፡ ሀገሩ፡ ወቀበርዎ፡ ምስለ፡ አበዊሁ፡ ውስተ፡ አፀዶሙ፡ ዶታይም፡ ወበላሞን።

translations.lxx: For as he stood overseeing them that bound sheaves in the field, the heat came upon his head, and he fell on his bed, and died in his city of Bethulia: and they buried him with his fathers in the field between Dothaim and Balamo.

verses.geez: ወነበረት፡ ዮዲት፡ መበለተ፡ ውስተ፡ ቤታ፡ ሠሉሰ፡ ወረቡዐ፡ ዕለተ።

translations.lxx: So Judith was a widow in her house three years and four months.

verses.geez: ወገብረት፡ ላቲ፡ ዐሪሠ፡ ውስተ፡ ናሕሰ፡ ቤታ፡ ወቀነተት፡ ሠቀ፡ ውስተ፡ ሐቌሃ፡ ወለብሰት፡ አልባሰ፡ መበለታ።

translations.lxx: And she made her a tent upon the top of her house, and put on sackcloth upon her loins, and ware her widow's apparel.

verses.geez: ወትጸውም፡ ኵሎ፡ መዋዕለ፡ መበለታ፡ እንበለ፡ እንተ፡ ቅድመ፡ ሰንበት፡ ወሰንበተኒ፡ ወእንተ፡ ቅድመ፡ ሠርቅ፡ ወሠርቀኒ፡ ወበዓላተኒ፡ ወትፍሥሕተ፡ ቤተ፡ እሥራኤል።

translations.lxx: And she fasted all the days of her widowhood, save the eves of the sabbaths, and the sabbaths, and the eves of the new moons, and the new moons, and the feasts and solemn days of the house of Israel.

verses.geez: ወሠናይት፡ ይእቲ፡ ራዕያ፡ ወላህያ፡ ገጻ፡ ጥቀ፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ወኀደገ፡ ላቲ፡ ምናሴ፡ ምታ፡ ወርቀ፡ ወብሩረ፡ ደቀ፡ ወአዋልደ፡ እንስሳ፡ ወገራውሀ፡ ወነበረት፡ ላዕሌሆሙ።

translations.lxx: She was also of a goodly countenance, and very beautiful to behold: and her husband Manasses had left her gold, and silver, and menservants, and maidservants, and cattle, and lands; and she remained upon them.

verses.geez: ወአልቦ፡ ዘያወጽእ፡ ላዕሌሃ፡ ቃለ፡ ሕሱመ፡ እስመ፡ ትፈርሆ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ፈድፋደ።

translations.lxx: And there was none that gave her an ill word; for she feared God greatly.

verses.geez: ወሰምዐት፡ ዘይቤሉ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ላዕለ፡ መልአኮሙ፡ እኩየ፡ እስመ፡ አንበዘት፡ ነፍሶሙ፡ በእንተ፡ ዘኀልቀ፡ ማይ፡ ወሰምዐት፡ ዮዲት፡ ኵሎ፡ ቃለ፡ ዘይቤሎሙ፡ ዖዝያን፡ ዘከመ፡ መሐለ፡ ሎሙ፡ ከመ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ሐሙስ፡ መዋዕል፡ ያገብኡ፡ ሀገሮሙ፡ ለፋርስ።

translations.lxx: Now when she heard the evil words of the people against the governor, that they fainted for lack of water; for Judith had heard all the words that Ozias had spoken unto them, and that he had sworn to deliver the city unto the Assyrians after five days;

verses.geez: ወፈነወት፡ ወጸውዓታ፡ ለሐፃኒታ፡ እንተ፡ ተዐቅብ፡ ኵሎ፡ ንዋያ፡ ወጸውዓቶሙ፡ ለክብሪን፡ ወለከርሚን፡ ወለሊቃውንተ፡ ሀገራ።

translations.lxx: then she sent her waiting-woman, that had the government of all things that she had, to call Ozias and Chabris and Charmis, the ancients of the city.

verses.geez: ወመጽኡ፡ ኀቤሃ፡ ወትቤሎሙ፡ ስምዑኒ፡ መኳንንቲሆሙ፡ ለእለ፡ ይነብሩ፡ ቤጤልዋ፡ እስመ፡ ኢኮነ፡ ጽድቀ፡ ቃልክሙ፡ ዘነበብክሙ፡ በቅድመ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ዮም፡ ወአቀምክሙ፡ በዝንቱ፡ ዘነበብክሙ፡ መሐላ፡ ማዕከሌክሙ፡ ወማዕከለ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ከመ፡ ታግብኡ፡ ሀገረክሙ፡ ለፀርክሙ፡ ለእመ፡ ኢረዳክሙ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በእላንቱ፡ ሐሙስ፡ መዋዕል።

translations.lxx: And they came unto her, and she said unto them, Hear me now, O ye governors of the inhabitants of Bethulia: for your words that ye have spoken before the people this day are not right, touching this oath which ye made and pronounced between God and you, and have promised to deliver the city to our enemies, unless within these days the Lord turn to help you.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ፡ ምንተኑ፡ አንትሙ፡ እለ፡ ታሜክርዎ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዮም፡ በዛቲ፡ ዕለት፡ ወቆምክሙ፡ ማእከለ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወማዕከለ፡ ደቀቀ፡ እጓለ፡ እመሕያው።

translations.lxx: And now who are ye that have tempted God this day, and stand instead of God among the children of men?

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ፡ የሐትት፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለሊሁ፡ ወአንትሙሰ፡ አልቦ፡ ዘተአምሩ፡ ለዝሉፉ።

translations.lxx: And now try the Lord Almighty, but ye shall never know any thing.

verses.geez: ዘእመቀ፡ ልቡ፡ ለእጓለ፡ እመሕያው፡ ኢተአምሩ፡ ወምክረ፡ ሕሊናሁ፡ ኢትሬእዩ፡ እፎ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ትትኃሠሥዎ፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ገብረ፡ ዘንተ፡ ኵሎ፡ ወልበ፡ ዚአሁ፡ ትፈቅዱ፡ ታእምሩ፡ ወምክረ፡ ዚአሁ፡ ተኃሥሡ፡ ትርከቡ፡ ሐሰ፡ ለክሙ፡ አኃውየ፡ ኢታምዕዕዎ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ።

translations.lxx: For ye cannot find the depth of the heart of man, neither can ye perceive the things that he thinketh: then how can ye search out God, that hath made all these things, and know his mind, or comprehend his purpose? Nay, my brethren, provoke not the Lord our God to anger.

verses.geez: እመኒ፡ ፈቀደ፡ ይርድእነ፡ እስከ፡ እማንቱ፡ ሐሙስ፡ መዋዕል፡ ሥሉጥ፡ ውእቱ፡ በዘፈቀደ፡ ያድኅነነ፡ ወእመኒ፡ በኵሉ፡ መዋዕሊነ፡ ወእመኒ፡ ይሤርወነ፡ በቅድመ፡ ፀርነ።

translations.lxx: For if he will not help us within these five days, he hath power to defend us when he will, even every day, or to destroy us before our enemies.

verses.geez: ወአንትሙሂ፡ ዳዕሙ፡ ኢታመክርዎ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክክሙ፡ እስመ፡ አኮ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ከመ፡ ሰብእ፡ ዘይትሜአክ፡ ወኢኮነ፡ ከመ፡ ወልደ፡ እጓለ፡ እመሕያው፡ ዘይትቄየም።

translations.lxx: Do not bind the counsels of the Lord our God: for God is not as man, that he may be threatened; neither is he as the son of man, that he should be wavering.

verses.geez: ወባሕቱ፡ ጽንሑ፡ መድኃኒተ፡ ዘእምኀቤሁ፡ ወጸውዕዎ፡ ይርድአነ፡ ወይስምዓነ፡ ቃለነ፡ እመ፡ ፈቀደ፡ ያድኅነነ።

translations.lxx: Therefore let us wait for salvation of him, and call upon him to help us, and he will hear our voice, if it please him.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ኢተንሥአ፡ በመዋዕሊነ፡ ወአልቦ፡ ዮም፡ ኢሕዝብ፡ ወኢነገድ፡ ወኢብሔር፡ ወኢሀገር፡ እምኔነ፡ እለ፡ ይሰግዱ፡ ለአማልክት፡ ግብረ፡ እደ፡ ሰብእ፡ በከመ፡ ኮነ፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ቀደምት።

translations.lxx: For there arose none in our age, neither is there any now in these days, neither tribe, nor family, nor people, nor city, among us, which worship gods made with hands, as hath been aforetime.

verses.geez: ወበእንቲአሁ፡ ኮኑ፡ ለኵናት፡ ወለተበርብሮ፡ አበዊነ፡ ወወድቁ፡ ዓቢየ፡ ድቀተ፡ እምቅድመ፡ ፀሮሙ።

translations.lxx: For the which cause our fathers were given to the sword, and for a spoil, and had a great fall before our enemies.

verses.geez: ወንሕነሰ፡ አልብነ፡ ባዕድ፡ አምላክ፡ እንበሌሁ፡ ወቦቱ፡ ንትአመን፡ ከመ፡ ኢይትዐወረነ፡ አዝማዲነ።

translations.lxx: But we know none other God, therefore we trust that he will not despise us, nor any of our nation.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ከመ፡ ነሥአነ፡ ከማሁ፡ ገብረ፡ ይሁዳ፡ ወተበርበረ፡ ኵሉ፡ ቅድሳቲነ፡ ወይትኃሠሦሙ፡ በእንተ፡ ርኵሶሙ፡ እምነ፡ አፉሆሙ።

translations.lxx: For if we be taken so, all Judea shall lie waste, and our sanctuary shall be spoiled; and he will require the profanation thereof at our mouth.

verses.geez: ወተቀትሉ፡ አኃዊነ፡ ወተፄወወ፡ ብሔርነ፡ ወማሰነ፡ ርስትነ፡ ዘይገብእ፡ ውስተ፡ ርስትነ፡ ወውስተ፡ አሕዛብ፡ ኀበ፡ ተቀነይነ፡ ህየ፡ ንከውን፡ ዕቁፋነ፡ ወግዩራነ፡ በቅድመ፡ እለ፡ ያጠርዩነ።

translations.lxx: And the slaughter of our brethren, and the captivity of the country, and the desolation of our inheritance, will he turn upon our heads among the Gentiles, wheresoever we shall be in bondage; and we shall be an offence and a reproach to all them that possess us.

verses.geez: እንበለ፡ አኰቴት፡ ይከውን፡ ቅኔነ፡ እስመ፡ ትሕትናነ፡ ርእየ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ።

translations.lxx: For our servitude shall not be directed to favour; but the Lord our God shall turn it to dishonour.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ፡ አኃዊነ፡ ንግርዎ፡ ለቢጽነ፡ እስመ፡ ኪያነ፡ ያጸምዑ፡ ወኀቤነ፡ ተሰቅለ፡ ነፍሶሙ፡ ወቤተ፡ መቅደስኒ፡ ወምሥዋዕኒ፡ ብነ፡ ያሰምክ።

translations.lxx: Now therefore, O brethren, let us shew an example to our brethren, because their hearts depend upon us, and the sanctuary, and the house, and the altar, rest upon us.

verses.geez: ወበዝንቱ፡ ኵሉ፡ ናእኵቶ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘያሜክረነ፡ በከመ፡ አበዊነ።

translations.lxx: Moreover let us give thanks to the Lord our God, which trieth us, even as he did our fathers.

verses.geez: ተዘከሩ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዘገብረ፡ ምስለ፡ አብርሃም፡ ወመጠነ፡ አመከሮ፡ ለይስሐቅ፡ ወበከመ፡ ኮነ፡ ለያዕቆብ፡ በመስጴጦምያ፡ ዘሶርያ፡ እንዘ፡ ይርኢ፡ አባግዒሁ፡ ለላባ፡ እኁሃ፡ ለእሙ።

translations.lxx: Remember what things he did to Abraham, and how he tried Isaac, and what happened to Jacob in Mesopotamia of Syria, when he kept the sheep of Laban his mother's brother.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ አኮ፡ አመ፡ አምከሮሙ፡ ለእልክቱ፡ ፈተነ፡ ልቦሙ፡ ወለነኒ፡ አኮ፡ ዘገፍዓነ፡ አላ፡ ከመ፡ ይምሐሮሙ፡ ለእለ፡ ይቀርብዎ፡ ይቀሥፎሙ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

translations.lxx: For he hath not tried us in the fire, as he did them, for the examination of their hearts, neither hath he taken vengeance on us: but the Lord doth scourge them that come near unto him, to admonish them.

verses.geez: ወይቤላ፡ ዖዝያን፡ ኵሎ፡ ዘተናገርኪ፡ በሠናይ፡ ልብ፡ ነበብኪ፡ ወአልቦ፡ ዘይትቃወሞ፡ ለቃልኪ።

translations.lxx: Then said Ozias to her, All that thou hast spoken hast thou spoken with a good heart, and there is none that may gainsay thy words.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ኢኮነ፡ እምዮም፡ ዘተሰምዐ፡ ጥበብኪ፡ አላ፡ እምነ፡ ቀዳሚ፡ መዋዕልኪ፡ አእመከ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሰብእ፡ ጥበበኪ፡ እስመ፡ ቡሩክ፡ ውእቱ፡ ፍጥረተ፡ ልብኪ።

translations.lxx: For this is not the first day wherein thy wisdom is manifested; but from the beginning of thy days all the people have known thy understanding, because the disposition of thine heart is good.

verses.geez: ወባሕቱ፡ እስመ፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ጸምዑ፡ ሕዝብ፡ አገበሩነ፡ ንግበር፡ ዘከመ፡ ይቤሉነ፡ ወአምጽኡ፡ ላዕሌነ፡ መሐላ፡ ዘኢንክል፡ ክሒደ።

translations.lxx: But the people were very thirsty, and compelled us to do unto them as we have spoken, and to bring an oath upon ourselves, which we will not break.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ፡ ጸልዩ፡ ለነ፡ እስመ፡ ብእሲት፡ ፈራሂተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አንቲ፡ ወይፌኑ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዝናመ፡ ወይምላዕ፡ ዓዘቃቲነ፡ ወኢንጸማዕ፡ እንከ።

translations.lxx: Therefore now pray thou for us, because thou art a godly woman, and the Lord will send us rain to fill our cisterns, and we shall faint no more.

verses.geez: ወትቤሎሙ፡ ዮዲት፡ ስምዑኒ፡ ወእገብር፡ ግብረ፡ ዘይትነገር፡ ለትውልደ፡ ትውልድ።

translations.lxx: Then said Judith unto them, Hear me, and I will do a thing, which shall go throughout all generations to the children of our nation.

verses.geez: ወአንትሙሰ፡ ቁመ፡ ኀበ፡ አንቀጽ፡ በዛቲ፡ ሌሊት፡ ወእወጽእ፡ አነ፡ ምስለ፡ ቊልዔትየ፡ ወበእልክቱ፡ መዋዕል፡ እለ፡ ትብሉ፡ ያገብእ፡ ሀገረ፡ ለፀርነ፡ ይረድአነ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላከ፡ እስራኤል፡ በእዴየ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall stand this night in the gate, and I will go forth with my waitingwoman: and within the days that ye have promised to deliver the city to our enemies the Lord will visit Israel by mine hand.

verses.geez: ወአንትሙሰ፡ ኢትሕትቱኒ፡ ዘእገብር፡ እስመ፡ ኢይነግረክሙ፡ እንከ፡ የሐልቅ፡ ዘእገብር።

translations.lxx: But enquire not ye of mine act: for I will not declare it unto you, till the things be finished that I do.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዋ፡ ዖዝያን፡ ወመላእክቲሆሙ፡ ሑሪ፡ በሰላም፡ ወእግዚአብሔር፡ ምስሌኪ፡ ወቅድሜኪ፡ ይትቤቀል፡ ፀረነ።

translations.lxx: Then said Ozias and the princes unto her, Go in peace, and the Lord God be before thee, to take vengeance on our enemies.

verses.geez: ወገብኡ፡ ወሖሩ፡ ኀበ፡ ቢጾሙ።

translations.lxx: So they returned from the tent, and went to their wards.
